summary: Iteration 14 - Soft Delete / Trash System Tests Complete. All 19 backend tests passed. Fixed route ordering bug for /invites/clear-all and /calls/history. Frontend UI verified: Invites (Clear All + trash icons), Contacts (delete buttons), Communications (email Delete button), Call History (Clear button), Notifications (Clear All).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug: /invites/clear-all and /calls/history routes must be defined BEFORE their parameterized counterparts (/invites/{invite_id} and /calls/history/{call_id}) to avoid path parameter matching 'clear-all' as an ID
Fixed InvitesView.jsx header layout: wrapped Clear All and New Invite buttons in a flex container for proper alignment
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for invites, emails, messages, contacts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 complete - Soft Delete system fully tested. Key endpoints: DELETE /api/invites/{id}, DELETE /api/invites/clear-all, DELETE /api/emails/{id}, DELETE /api/messages/{id}, DELETE /api/messages/clear/{with_user}, DELETE /api/calls/history/{call_id}, DELETE /api/calls/history, DELETE /api/contacts/{contact_id}, DELETE /api/notifications/clear-all, POST /api/trash/restore, GET /api/trash, DELETE /api/trash/purge. All GET endpoints now filter out soft-deleted items (deleted_at exists). Frontend pages verified: Invites (/invites), Contacts (/contacts), Communications (/communications), Call History (/call-history), Notifications (/notifications).

soft_delete_endpoints.DELETE /api/invites/clear-all: Trashes all user's invites, returns {ok: true, trashed: count}

trash_endpoints.GET /api/trash: Lists all trashed items grouped by collection
trash_endpoints.GET /api/trash?collection=X: Lists trashed items for specific collection

invites_page.trash_icons: data-testid='invite-delete-{id}' - Red trash icon per row

contacts_page.delete_buttons: data-testid='contact-delete-{id}' or 'contact-del-{id}' - Red trash icon per contact

communications_page.email_delete_button: data-testid='email-delete-btn' - Red Delete button next to Reply in email detail view

call_history_page.clear_button: data-testid='calls-clear-all' - Shown only when calls exist

notifications_page.clear_all_button: data-testid='notif-clear-all' - Shown only when notifications exist

bugs_fixed.fix: Moved clear-all route BEFORE parameterized route in server.py

bugs_fixed.issue: InvitesView header layout broken - 3 elements with space-between
bugs_fixed.fix: Wrapped Clear All and New Invite buttons in flex container
